race.comment: Competitive race. TOBIKKO (5) is a promising gelding resuming for the Stokes camp. He produced big late splits on debut when narrowly beaten before justifying strong market next start. Two strong trials should have him ready to fire fresh. The wide draw means he'll likely be circling them late. REDDERS (2) comes through strong carnival form and caught the eye at headquarters last time behind a smart Vic galloper. The blinkers go on, and he maps perfectly for Milnes from the draw. LIKE A DRIFTER (3) has gone back-to-back this prep and continues to improve. There's still upside to come and the ceiling remains unknown. BEYOND MYSTI (6) dug deep to score against her own sex last start and looks to have reached peak fitness now. Worth following up. CAPTAIN HAPPY (4) improved sharply second-up and is another open to further progression.
